description: hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+dropout_warmup (d:0->0.1 over 30ep, learn features first then regularize)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05 (seed=43, check seed sensitivity of best config)
hopt1+clam_mb+noise001+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+dropout_warmup_30ep (alt path from row76, no R-Drop, noise aug + dropout warmup)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (halve LR every 20 epochs after warmup, different decay from cosine)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr+d_warmup20 (step LR + dropout warmup, combining two near-misses)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+tt_dropout_10 (10 forward passes with dropout ON at test time, avg probs)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+flat20_cosine (flat LR 20ep after warmup, then cosine decay)
hopt1+vit+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (nnMIL vision_transformer, self-attention over patches with ALiBi)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr+mbs2 (step LR + micro_batch=2 for more gradient noise)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+ce_weighted+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (step LR + weighted CE loss, no focal)
hopt1+clam_mb+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr+feat_center (per-slide mean subtraction to remove batch effects)
variance_pool+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (CLAM_MB with attention-weighted variance pooling, captures heterogeneity)
aem_lambda05+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (attention entropy maximization lambda=0.5, prevent attention collapse)
psemix_k4+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (pseudo-bag: split each bag into 4, mixup between slides, Beta(0.5,0.5))
topk256_attn+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (keep only top-256 patches by attention score, mask rest)
coord_pe+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (sinusoidal 2D positional encoding from patch (x,y) coords added to features)
aem_lambda005+rdrop_a1+focal_g1+no_inst+gc05+step_lr (attention entropy maximization lambda=0.05, much gentler, prevent attention collapse)
